instructions.title: Bridge test — read-only health check
instructions.instruction:
Bridge test of the Instruction Claude loop. READ-ONLY — do NOT create, edit, pause, spend, or launch anything.
1) Confirm you are the marketer agent (one line).
2) Via the zernio MCP, resolve the live MYR ad account and list its name, id, currency.
3) Confirm the two pixels: PeningBot 986352420917190, PeningLab 1013990424497184.
4) Reply with a short summary, and WhatsApp the owner one line via whacenter: "Instruction Claude bridge live".
5) Append your report to _shared/reports/bridge-test.md.
